overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character in a leather jacket and hat walking through a rainy, gas-lit historic city at night. The character moves from a covered sidewalk beneath building awnings into a wide cobblestone boulevard lined with ornate 19th-century buildings with iron balconies.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the historic building overhang

entered.detail: wooden overhang extending from the building providing shelter from rain
weathered stone building wall with vertical columns and architectural details
cast iron street lamp emitting warm yellow light through glass panels
tall boundary wall running parallel to the sidewalk
parked horse-drawn carriage with large spoked wheels

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cobblestone sidewalk sheltered beneath a building overhang. Warm gas lamps line the left side while a stone wall runs parallel, and a parked carriage sits on the right. The rain is audible but the character remains dry under the awning.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with vintage posters and building entrance

events.description: a seated figure becomes visible on the building steps to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the covered walkway, passing colorful wall posters and approaching the open street ahead

notable_agents.action: sitting on the stone building steps, facing away from the street

entered.detail: colorful vintage circus and show posters plastered on the building wall
stone steps leading up to a dark doorway entrance

segments.scene_description: Continuing under the covered walkway, the character passes vintage posters on the right wall and approaches a seated figure on the building steps. The enclosed corridor begins to open up ahead as the awning ends, revealing the rainy street beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cobblestone boulevard with park benches and street trees

events.description: exits the covered walkway into the open rainy street with visible night sky
rain becomes visible falling through the beams of street lamps

agents.ego_description: walking out from under the shelter into the open rain-soaked street, moving toward the wide boulevard

entered.detail: wooden slatted park bench on the sidewalk edge near bushes
mature leafy trees lining the boulevard edge
large multi-story historic building with illuminated windows and ornate balconies

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into the open night, where rain is visibly falling through the gas lamp beams. The space opens into a wide cobblestone boulevard with a park bench and trees on the right, while grand historic mansions with glowing windows rise ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide historic street with ornate corner buildings

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of the wide cobblestone street past grand illuminated buildings

entered.detail: ornate three-story corner building with iron railings and wraparound balconies
building with ground-floor arched openings and warm interior lighting
tall cast iron lamp post with bright glowing lantern

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the wide historic boulevard, passing a prominent ornate corner building with iron balconies on the right. The street stretches ahead lined with glowing street lamps, while the rain creates reflective surfaces on the cobblestones under the warm gas light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character transitions from a sheltered, narrow walkway into the expansive openness of a rainy, gas-lit boulevard. It begins beneath a building overhang, moving past warm gas lamps and a parked carriage while the character remains dry under the awning. As the camera continues forward, it passes vintage posters and a seated figure on some steps before the enclosed corridor opens up to the elements. The scene then shifts as the character emerges into the open night, where rain falls through beams of light and the space expands into a wide cobblestone street lined with park benches and grand mansions. Finally, the camera follows the character further into the boulevard, passing an ornate corner building with iron balconies as the warm street lamps create shimmering reflections on the wet pavement.
